userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 7.2 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
Pay 0.0650% on fixed leg 70,000,000 Receive USD LIBOR 3M on floating leg 66,500,000 Expiry 21 aug 2016
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
Pay 0.0650% on fixed leg 66,500,000 Receive AUD BBSW 3M on floating leg 95,000,000 Expiry 21 aug 2016
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
